name: exe2hexbat
title: exe2hexbat

commands.name: exe2hex

arguments.description: show this help message and exit
arguments.raw: -h, --help  show this help message and exit

arguments.description: The EXE binary file to convert
arguments.raw: -x EXE      The EXE binary file to convert
-b BAT      BAT output file (DEBUG.exe method - x86)
-p POSH     PoSh output file (PowerShell method - x86/x64)

arguments.description: pRefix - text to add before the command on each line
arguments.raw: -r TEXT     pRefix - text to add before the command on each line

arguments.description: suFfix - text to add after the command on each line
arguments.raw: -f TEXT     suFfix - text to add after the command on each line
-l INT      Maximum HEX values per line

arguments.description: Clones and compress the file before converting (-cc for higher
arguments.raw: -c          Clones and compress the file before converting (-cc for higher

arguments.description: Create a Expect file, to automate to a Telnet session.
arguments.raw: -t          Create a Expect file, to automate to a Telnet session.

arguments.description: Create a Expect file, to automate to a WinEXE session.
arguments.raw: -w          Create a Expect file, to automate to a WinEXE session.

commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# exe2hex -h
 [*] exe2hex v1.5.1
 Usage: exe2hex [options]
 
 Options:
 -h, --help  show this help message and exit
 -x EXE      The EXE binary file to convert
 -s          Read from STDIN
 -b BAT      BAT output file (DEBUG.exe method - x86)
 -p POSH     PoSh output file (PowerShell method - x86/x64)
 -e          URL encode the output
 -r TEXT     pRefix - text to add before the command on each line
 -f TEXT     suFfix - text to add after the command on each line
 -l INT      Maximum HEX values per line
 -c          Clones and compress the file before converting (-cc for higher
             compression)
 -t          Create a Expect file, to automate to a Telnet session.
 -w          Create a Expect file, to automate to a WinEXE session.
 -v          Enable verbose mode

apt_metadata.description:
Convert EXE to bat
A Python script to convert a Windows PE executable file to a batch file and
vice versa.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use exe2hex because ### exe2hexbat.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `exe2hex [options]` as documented upstream for exe2hex.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair exe2hex with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `exe2hex --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### exe2hexbat.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install exe2hexbat
Install with: sudo apt install exe2hexbat
